name: Dominion Income Trust 1
analysis: DN1 has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$98.7077. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$98.6510 where 5 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$98.7077, stop A$94.3955, target A$99.2313. Risk/reward is 0.12:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
